Even the smallest contribution can have a HUGE impact. We've set an ambitious goal to bring in another 1,000 Founding Donors before midnight on Sunday. **[I'm asking you to be one of the last 623 donors we need to hit our goal before Sunday at midnight. Friend,

It’s almost Christmas, and I have a very special opportunity for YOU.

We are surprising my father and our First Lady with a special Christmas card filled with signatures from our BEST supporters, and I know they’ll be excited to see YOUR NAME on it.

Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between December 11, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on December 26, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive one signed Official Make America Great Again Hat (collectively, the “Prize”). The Prize includes the following components:a. One (1) signed Official Make America Great Again Hat, signed by auto-pen:b. One (1) certificate of authentication; The total approximate retail value of the Prize is $30. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. body:
Peter, I just spoke to my colleagues in Georgia and they said in the last _**100 hours**_ they have seen a MASSIVE amount of dark Democrat money spill into Georgia. It has them worried, Peter, and they fear if we don't act we'll fall too far behind in the polls to catch back up by January.

**I won 't sugarcoat it, and I won't waste your time: **

_**-> We have 100 HOURS to counteract the massive money dump from the Left if we're going to stand a chance to save Georgia in January.**_

_****_
_**-> If every donor receiving this donates a minimum of $25, we won't only beat the Democrats money drop, we'll blow them completely out of the water.**_

This is our chance to put the Democrats on their heels, Peter. It's one of those opportunities in a close battle we can't afford to pass and not take advantage.

clean_body: Peter, I just spoke to my colleagues in Georgia and they said in the last 100 hours they have seen a MASSIVE amount of dark Democrat money spill into Georgia. It has them worried, Peter, and they fear if we don't act we'll fall too far behind in the polls to catch back up by January. I won 't sugarcoat it, and I won't waste your time: -> We have 100 HOURS to counteract the massive money dump from the Left if we're going to stand a chance to save Georgia in January. ** -> If every donor receiving this donates a minimum of $25, we won't only beat the Democrats money drop, we'll blow them completely out of the water. This is our chance to put the Democrats on their heels, Peter. It's one of those opportunities in a close battle we can't afford to pass and not take advantage. ** This has unquestionably become the most important goal of the year. We have to show the Left that we're able to combat their megadonors with our Conservative, grassroots base. We need everyone's participation on this, Peter. I hope you won't let your country or fellow Conservatives down. Best, Marco Rubio Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Hey Hoosier Republican, this is Jake

We are under four weeks away from the critical Senate runoffs in Georgia, and your help is crucial!

Did you see Kyle’s earlier email? We’re forwarding it, so if you missed it, please scroll down to read!

The bottom line is that we’re just DAYS away from the critical Senate races in Georgia. Both of their U.S. Senate seats are facing runoffs on January 5th, and the outcome will affect America’s entire future.

We need to reelect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue in order to keep our Senate majority and prevent Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer from running amok in Washington!

Please help us defend our majority in the Senate and keep the radical left in check by donating toward our moneybomb event right now.

Thanks!

name: True the Vote
subject: Weekly Update | Validate the Vote GA | 12.13.20
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3486)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Friends -

This is a long update, but there’s a lot to report, both from the front lines of True the Vote and from me to you, personally, as fellow Americans.

If you’re on this email list, it’s because you’re concerned about election integrity - and you’re right to be. We’ve talked for years about the need for reform and greater citizen engagement, lest we reach a tipping point that would take our country to a place of unbridled chaos. That tipping point occurred in 2020. You are right to be concerned. We are now in new, uncharted terrain. The question is what comes next.

For the past two weeks, I’ve been in Georgia with a small team from True the Vote, working on specific, tangible ways to help ensure transparency and accuracy in the critical run-off elections that will determine the balance of power in the Senate. We’ve met with voters and state leaders, leading ultimately to a request from the Georgia Republican Party to provide publicly available nonpartisan signature verification training, a 24x7 voter hotline, ballot-curing support, and more.

Our focus on Georgia does not mean, in any way, that we condone or concede what happened on November 3rd. The patterns in voter turnout and supporting data exhibit anomalies pointing to the subversion of select races, specifically in the contest for the presidency. That is a true statement.

True the Vote is still supporting efforts to uncover General Election fraud. We have provided many whistleblowers, testimonies, and affidavits to Sidney Powell and have provided data and support to all camps including Powell, Giuliani, and The Amistead Project. True the Vote’s own lawsuits in WI, MI, GA, and PA, were dismissed on November 13th after an excruciating series of events that will one day be known, but now is not the time to air. Bottom line, we will help anyone we can.

_Many of you have contacted us asking how you can help. We know your hearts and we share in your desire to take action. For more specific information on how to help in Georgia and beyond, you can skip down to the paragraph titled_**Georgia and Ground Up.**_Many more have asked why we are not actively fundraising right now. For that information, you can skip down to_**Funding Needs** _._ But before I get to that, I’d like to share a personal story of what happened this weekend.

---
| | **WHAT HAPPENED IN WASHINGTON, DC**

---
| | |
---
I’m writing this while on a plane packed full of patriots going home from Saturday’s rallies in Washington, DC. On December 12th, thousands of Americans joined together, in DC and across the country, to pray for our nation. It was an incredible experience. My son went with me. When I started True the Vote he was 12 years old, now he’s 22. He’s grown up in the movement and is now a strong patriot. I wanted him to experience the [Jericho March, ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqZXJpY2hvbWFyY2gub3JnJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3503)but I also wanted him to see what used to be Lafayette Square and is now Black Lives Matter Plaza. I wanted him to see what has become of our nation’s capital.

| | You couldn’t get into BLM plaza. The entire area was cordoned off all day by police. I spoke to one of the officers who said they were there "to keep people out of the danger zone". Understand, this an area comprising several blocks inside the beltway, including the Hays-Adams hotel, the historic St. John’s Church, the park, and many, many businesses, most of which have been abandoned. Boarded up and graffitied over.
The day was amazing, full of prayer, patriotism, and positive-vibes. People are committed to this battle. And that’s what we need because restoring election integrity will be neither quick nor easy. I saw old friends like [Ed Martin](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZlYWdsZWZvcnVtLm9yZyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3504)**** and [Ali Alexander](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0d2l0dGVyLmNvbSUyRmFsaSUzRnJlZl9zcmMlM0R0d3NyYyUyNTVFZ29vZ2xlJTI1N0N0d2NhbXAlMjU1RXNlcnAlMjU3Q3R3Z3IlMjU1RWF1dGhvcg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3505) and met new ones like [Owen Shroyer](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuaW5mb3dhcnMuY29tJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3506). It was amazing to see a program featuring speakers, from [Robert Weinger,](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzaG9mYXJzb2dyZWF0LmNvbSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3507) who opened the program, having flown from Israel after receiving rabbinical permission to blow the shofar on Sabbath, to [Alex Jones,](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuaW5mb3dhcnMuY29tJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3506) who took to the stage in unity for our beloved America.

---
| | [ ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20lMkZ3YXRjaCUzRnYlM0R1WlRPdmxLb0c0RSUyNmZlYXR1cmUlM0R5b3V0dS5iZQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3509)
---
| | Everyone was in one accord. Our freedom is in peril. Extraordinary action must be taken to preserve it.

Later that night, things got much worse, with rioting, fighting, stabbings, and shots fired. We had long since left, but watched clips on social media, recognizing the streets where we’d just been.

Friends, my sense is this is just the beginning. Now is the time to brush up on why you believe what you believe, why freedom matters, and what you are willing to do to preserve it. I pray I am wrong, but I don’t think so. We’ve been through so much, been pushed so far. Saying "we’ll get it right next time" isn’t enough. Things have to change.

---
| | **GEORGIA AND GROUND UP**

---
| | |
---
We are actively working in Georgia to defend election integrity. Specifically, we are using our research of the voter rolls to help prevent illegal votes from being cast. I’ll report more on this in the week ahead.

We are also:

* pressing the Secretary of State for answers about the Emergency Rules to be used in the upcoming election. (Note: to date, pressing has meant filling for open records, but legal action may be necessary. A lawsuit has been filed by the GA Republican Party that will help determine what access will be made available. We are prepared to take swift legal action if required)

* supporting Georgia voters with a Georgia Voter Election Integrity Hotline

* supporting Georgia election workers with Signature Verification Training

* working to gain access to ballot drop-box security camera feeds in order to livestream in the interest of transparency

* working to assist Georgia voters in curing ballot discrepancies

* leading webinars and FAQ sessions for government leaders in support of their constituents who are understandably angry about what happened in November.

Many of you want to come to Georgia to help. Thank you for your commitment to serve! Georgia election laws allow only residents of Georgia to serve in elections. We may well need your help online, in voter outreach, but until we know more we don’t want to enlist anyone outside of Georgia.

[**If you live in Georgia and are willing to help True the Vote in your state,****please sign up here.**
](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5hY3RpdmVob3N0ZWQuY29tJTJGZiUyRjM5&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3508)
If you don’t live in Georgia, please keep watch for email updates, as we will likely have a call to action for online support within the coming two weeks.

The Georgia election is January 5th. The Presidential Inauguration will be January 20th. Those are two major milestone days. Between now and then, we will be noses down.

Election integrity work is a very granular and exacting process. It doesn’t lend itself to a whole lot of headlines. But we will be making many in the coming days. Stay tuned.

True the Vote is not letting off the gas in 2021. Our new project "Ground Up" will support the recruiting, training, and mobilizing of local election-integrity groups across the country. Yes, national reforms are needed, but I believe the best way to defend against increased federal subversion is through informing and empowering each other locally to protect elections in our own states and hometowns. More to come on that, but rest assured it is coming.

| | FUNDING NEEDS
---
| | Inboxes are overflowing with requests for donations from other organizations to stop election fraud. I can’t speak to what they are doing with those dollars. We had a large donation given to us after the election, which we believed would allow us to avoid having to send constant fundraising emails for the activities described above and the support of a whistleblower fund. I thought it was an answer to prayer. Shortly after the donation was made, I was asked by consultants affiliated with the donor to transfer money to them. I said no and a few days later we were sued. What’s more, the consultants put together a huge smear campaign that they released to the mainstream press on Thanksgiving Day. ****

After ten years in this fight, being targeted by the Obama Administration, suing and beating the IRS, and taking hits from all sides, this is just one more chapter in exposing the swamp.

But, we do need your help. ****[**If you can donate to help support our work, please do. Your donation will be used to fund the work in Georgia, but also to begin the work on Ground Up ...which is the answer to "what comes next". We have gone from a staff of two to a staff of twelve; including talented investigators, analysts, trainers, attorneys, and writers. True the Vote was conceived for such a time as this and our best days are ahead****.**](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19ob21lXzYyNDIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=335A762A20A3496)

I know it has been a tough few weeks. It will get tougher still.

We are in this together. The only way out is to get busy.

It’s up to us to fix this - you, me, and anyone who loves America. Working together, we can and will, true the vote.

Onward -
Catherine

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote, Founder

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | Friends - This is a long update, but there’s a lot to report, both from the front lines of True the Vote and from me to you, personally, as fellow Americans. If you’re on this email list, it’s because you’re concerned about election integrity - and you’re right to be. We’ve talked for years about the need for reform and greater citizen engagement, lest we reach a tipping point that would take our country to a place of unbridled chaos. That tipping point occurred in 2020. You are right to be concerned. We are now in new, uncharted terrain. The question is what comes next. For the past two weeks, I’ve been in Georgia with a small team from True the Vote, working on specific, tangible ways to help ensure transparency and accuracy in the critical run-off elections that will determine the balance of power in the Senate. We’ve met with voters and state leaders, leading ultimately to a request from the Georgia Republican Party to provide publicly available nonpartisan signature verification training, a 24x7 voter hotline, ballot-curing support, and more. Our focus on Georgia does not mean, in any way, that we condone or concede what happened on November 3rd. The patterns in voter turnout and supporting data exhibit anomalies pointing to the subversion of select races, specifically in the contest for the presidency. That is a true statement. True the Vote is still supporting efforts to uncover General Election fraud. We have provided many whistleblowers, testimonies, and affidavits to Sidney Powell and have provided data and support to all camps including Powell, Giuliani, and The Amistead Project. True the Vote’s own lawsuits in WI, MI, GA, and PA, were dismissed on November 13th after an excruciating series of events that will one day be known, but now is not the time to air. Bottom line, we will help anyone we can. Many of you have contacted us asking how you can help. We know your hearts and we share in your desire to take action. For more specific information on how to help in Georgia and beyond, you can skip down to the paragraph titledGeorgia and Ground Up.Many more have asked why we are not actively fundraising right now. For that information, you can skip down toFunding Needs . But before I get to that, I’d like to share a personal story of what happened this weekend. | | WHAT HAPPENED IN WASHINGTON, DC | | | I’m writing this while on a plane packed full of patriots going home from Saturday’s rallies in Washington, DC. On December 12th, thousands of Americans joined together, in DC and across the country, to pray for our nation. It was an incredible experience. My son went with me. When I started True the Vote he was 12 years old, now he’s 22. He’s grown up in the movement and is now a strong patriot. I wanted him to experience the I also wanted him to see what used to be Lafayette Square and is now Black Lives Matter Plaza. I wanted him to see what has become of our nation’s capital. | | You couldn’t get into BLM plaza. The entire area was cordoned off all day by police. I spoke to one of the officers who said they were there "to keep people out of the danger zone". Understand, this an area comprising several blocks inside the beltway, including the Hays-Adams hotel, the historic St. John’s Church, the park, and many, many businesses, most of which have been abandoned. Boarded up and graffitied over. The day was amazing, full of prayer, patriotism, and positive-vibes. People are committed to this battle. And that’s what we need because restoring election integrity will be neither quick nor easy. I saw old friends like ** and and met new ones like . It was amazing to see a program featuring speakers, from who opened the program, having flown from Israel after receiving rabbinical permission to blow the shofar on Sabbath, to who took to the stage in unity for our beloved America. | | | | Everyone was in one accord. Our freedom is in peril. Extraordinary action must be taken to preserve it. Later that night, things got much worse, with rioting, fighting, stabbings, and shots fired. We had long since left, but watched clips on social media, recognizing the streets where we’d just been. Friends, my sense is this is just the beginning. Now is the time to brush up on why you believe what you believe, why freedom matters, and what you are willing to do to preserve it. I pray I am wrong, but I don’t think so. We’ve been through so much, been pushed so far. Saying "we’ll get it right next time" isn’t enough. Things have to change. | | GEORGIA AND GROUND UP | | | We are actively working in Georgia to defend election integrity. Specifically, we are using our research of the voter rolls to help prevent illegal votes from being cast. I’ll report more on this in the week ahead. We are also: pressing the Secretary of State for answers about the Emergency Rules to be used in the upcoming election. (Note: to date, pressing has meant filling for open records, but legal action may be necessary. A lawsuit has been filed by the GA Republican Party that will help determine what access will be made available. We are prepared to take swift legal action if required) supporting Georgia voters with a Georgia Voter Election Integrity Hotline supporting Georgia election workers with Signature Verification Training working to gain access to ballot drop-box security camera feeds in order to livestream in the interest of transparency working to assist Georgia voters in curing ballot discrepancies leading webinars and FAQ sessions for government leaders in support of their constituents who are understandably angry about what happened in November. Many of you want to come to Georgia to help. Thank you for your commitment to serve! Georgia election laws allow only residents of Georgia to serve in elections. We may well need your help online, in voter outreach, but until we know more we don’t want to enlist anyone outside of Georgia. If you don’t live in Georgia, please keep watch for email updates, as we will likely have a call to action for online support within the coming two weeks. The Georgia election is January 5th. The Presidential Inauguration will be January 20th. Those are two major milestone days. Between now and then, we will be noses down. Election integrity work is a very granular and exacting process. It doesn’t lend itself to a whole lot of headlines. But we will be making many in the coming days. Stay tuned. True the Vote is not letting off the gas in 2021. Our new project "Ground Up" will support the recruiting, training, and mobilizing of local election-integrity groups across the country. Yes, national reforms are needed, but I believe the best way to defend against increased federal subversion is through informing and empowering each other locally to protect elections in our own states and hometowns. More to come on that, but rest assured it is coming. | | FUNDING NEEDS | | Inboxes are overflowing with requests for donations from other organizations to stop election fraud. I can’t speak to what they are doing with those dollars. We had a large donation given to us after the election, which we believed would allow us to avoid having to send constant fundraising emails for the activities described above and the support of a whistleblower fund. I thought it was an answer to prayer. Shortly after the donation was made, I was asked by consultants affiliated with the donor to transfer money to them. I said no and a few days later we were sued. What’s more, the consultants put together a huge smear campaign that they released to the mainstream press on Thanksgiving Day. After ten years in this fight, being targeted by the Obama Administration, suing and beating the IRS, and taking hits from all sides, this is just one more chapter in exposing the swamp. But, we do need your help. ** I know it has been a tough few weeks. It will get tougher still. We are in this together. The only way out is to get busy. It’s up to us to fix this - you, me, and anyone who loves America. Working together, we can and will, true the vote. Onward - Catherine | | | | Catherine Engelbrecht True the Vote, Founder | | | | | | | | | | | | | | True the Vote is a nonpartisan organization recognized under section 501(c)3 of the Internal Revenue Code, Federal Tax ID # 27-2860095. Contributions or gifts to True the Vote are tax-deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes to the fullest extent permitted by law. _ | | | | | Join the conversation on social: | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved | | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

\------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: I'm the only Republican... From: Matt Gaetz <[info@mattgaetz.com](mailto:info@mattgaetz.com)> Date: Wednesday, December 9, 2020 at 6:43 PM

Patriot,
To be the best Congressman that I can be, tough decisions have to be made. I must make every decision based on what is right for the American people, even if doesn't benefit me. That's why I've chosen to reject all donations from corporate PACs and their lobbyists, the only Republican in Congress to do so!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Patriot, Matt is fighting hard for the people of the Silent Majority, so we wanted to make sure you saw his message from earlier in the week. As the only Republican in Congress who won't take corporate PAC money, Matt has shunned the lobbyists and the D.C. Swamp to defend the interests of the American people. Because of this, he has a huge target on his back. The Swamp wants Matt out of Congress for bucking the "norms" of D.C., so he's going to need your help! We only take donations from Patriots like you, == == == == == | | | == | Thanks for your support! -Team Gaetz \------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: I'm the only Republican... From: Matt Gaetz <mailto:info@mattgaetz.com> Date: Wednesday, December 9, 2020 at 6:43 PM Patriot, To be the best Congressman that I can be, tough decisions have to be made. I must make every decision based on what is right for the American people, even if doesn't benefit me. That's why I've chosen to reject all donations from corporate PACs and their lobbyists, the only Republican in Congress to do so! | == | | | == | We must put the interests of Americans over the special interests in Washington D.C., and return power back to the hands of the people. Our government has been handed over to the globalist and international corporations who want to ship our jobs to China and watch the middle of our country waste away. Since I am the only Republican in Congress who won't take corporate PAC money, I am funded only by Patriots like you. I will need your support to take on these giant corporations chipping away at our rights, so I'm asking that you DONATE TODAY so I can continue to work for you! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for your support! | | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Ester, FL 32569 | | Sent by mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Senator Perdue on Sunday Morning Futures: We’re The Last Line Of Defense
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/54637ea31d99/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66899?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| **Senator Perdue on**** _Sunday Morning Futures_ : We're The Last Line Of Defense**
---
| Hey there,
This morning, Senator Perdue joined Maria Bartiromo on Fox News’ _Sunday Morning Futures_ for a conversation on what’s at stake in this race, election integrity, and why Jon Ossoff can’t be trusted to hold China accountable.
* _**“We’re the last line of defense against this radical, leftist agenda the Democrats are trying to perpetrate on America.** If we win Georgia, it’s very simple: we save America. Kelly and I are splitting up around the state. We’re going from places like Hahira to Hiawassee, talking to voters to make sure they know what’s at stake and to make sure they get this vote out.”_ – **Senator Perdue**

* _“[Ossoff]’s ties to China are closer than Biden’s or Swalwell’s. For two years, he worked with the CCP, Maria, and he hid it from the state of Georgia.**He lied about it, got caught, and lied about it again.** This is something that's very serious and has only come to light recently, but I'm very concerned because China, as you pointed out, is one of the number one challenges we have along with our debt going forward. That's why we have to hold the line here in Georgia.”_ – **Senator Perdue**

Click _[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6f3e42dc83&e=02cd889ad3)_ or below to watch the full segment.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a2483c2d81&e=02cd889ad3 "Sen. David Perdue Joins Sunday Morning Futures With Maria Bartiromo")
---
| Folks, now is the time. We MUST defend these two seats in the Senate to win Georgia and save America, and we do that by voting. **Early voting starts TOMORROW**. Visit the [Georgia My Voter Page](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c6df9a5bc8&e=02cd889ad3) to find your early voting polling place or request your absentee ballot. Thank you for helping us hold the line. \- Team Perdue

body:
Georgia holds the key to the Senate Majority. Chuck Schumer is rapidly mobilizing dark-money donor networks to outspend common-sense conservatives, Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.
Friend,

Our efforts in this fight could very well save America from a full radical left takeover. [**Can I count on you to join my list of patriots?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ka4OgVrCeiMvgEW5yAjiSHZTyIry8tXz2NXQ5kylsNmEya68JQxieTZB0vUi4QuIgi0cjt7yx3La6auYHrH8NawKjbcTQv5FAlrIscVoIbXNyBA2cj_xI9PtQxsfPyb8SZZ_lFO3CT53KKTTojtJOI6FnZcPzkaeg8rTkSF6LKbAn1DdVBVCFfZUcRG6MvxlJqh8-H7tVo30qvSagPXJs683N5-WPyA0EiXgZtCk_y7URr1FwJgF1riOzz-XFOkZ7VJ-HNkDCOmT3NrRmnLWQRWtpIxprywYt2X1nFDeBWm5__49lIgCoXloLDlxtIJEZO1tbRzeJfynRRYGnvU_Ml1TZ6hwx99EFBFALD046cQU3ca7DihvqPxZftMUg8Nc-E2o_K0cLJV769Fg7C-mi_fbK9kw74sfixtCnVOSux4=&c=1TrodBzXnk1pUXxh5QSFt0OAX4eLg7D-InYvrhxkfDTqTsxfRtDBTQ==&ch=VPBgr_s9Agl1zdJikskscbfXsPrv0K2-9d8jgdjBcjHY0r5vfkJT5A==)

My opponent Raphael Warnock does not have Georgia's best interests in mind. He will follow what Chuck Schumer and AOC dictate, which means signing off on any radical policy they put forward. His loyalty is with the Radical Left, and not with the people of Georgia.
I will continue fighting in the Senate and representing Georgians first and foremost. [**But first we have to hit our deadline goals and keep taking every step we can toward election day so we can have the resources necessary to win the January 5th runoff election.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ka4OgVrCeiMvgEW5yAjiSHZTyIry8tXz2NXQ5kylsNmEya68JQxieTZB0vUi4QuIgi0cjt7yx3La6auYHrH8NawKjbcTQv5FAlrIscVoIbXNyBA2cj_xI9PtQxsfPyb8SZZ_lFO3CT53KKTTojtJOI6FnZcPzkaeg8rTkSF6LKbAn1DdVBVCFfZUcRG6MvxlJqh8-H7tVo30qvSagPXJs683N5-WPyA0EiXgZtCk_y7URr1FwJgF1riOzz-XFOkZ7VJ-HNkDCOmT3NrRmnLWQRWtpIxprywYt2X1nFDeBWm5__49lIgCoXloLDlxtIJEZO1tbRzeJfynRRYGnvU_Ml1TZ6hwx99EFBFALD046cQU3ca7DihvqPxZftMUg8Nc-E2o_K0cLJV769Fg7C-mi_fbK9kw74sfixtCnVOSux4=&c=1TrodBzXnk1pUXxh5QSFt0OAX4eLg7D-InYvrhxkfDTqTsxfRtDBTQ==&ch=VPBgr_s9Agl1zdJikskscbfXsPrv0K2-9d8jgdjBcjHY0r5vfkJT5A==)
[**BE ONE OF THE 1,244 Patriots**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ka4OgVrCeiMvgEW5yAjiSHZTyIry8tXz2NXQ5kylsNmEya68JQxieTZB0vUi4QuIgi0cjt7yx3La6auYHrH8NawKjbcTQv5FAlrIscVoIbXNyBA2cj_xI9PtQxsfPyb8SZZ_lFO3CT53KKTTojtJOI6FnZcPzkaeg8rTkSF6LKbAn1DdVBVCFfZUcRG6MvxlJqh8-H7tVo30qvSagPXJs683N5-WPyA0EiXgZtCk_y7URr1FwJgF1riOzz-XFOkZ7VJ-HNkDCOmT3NrRmnLWQRWtpIxprywYt2X1nFDeBWm5__49lIgCoXloLDlxtIJEZO1tbRzeJfynRRYGnvU_Ml1TZ6hwx99EFBFALD046cQU3ca7DihvqPxZftMUg8Nc-E2o_K0cLJV769Fg7C-mi_fbK9kw74sfixtCnVOSux4=&c=1TrodBzXnk1pUXxh5QSFt0OAX4eLg7D-InYvrhxkfDTqTsxfRtDBTQ==&ch=VPBgr_s9Agl1zdJikskscbfXsPrv0K2-9d8jgdjBcjHY0r5vfkJT5A==)

Victory will take all conservatives coming together and taking a strong stand against the Radical Left. The Radical Left is making their final move in Georgia, but we can still STOP them.
I look forward to continuing to fight alongside Patriots like you.
Thank you,
Kelly Loeffler

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T5d4Rwq2y2NwodaTxWmhIbTCsm_UyV3q6qokRunjdVKFQ7yxW581gOdEhmil_YIY1zRq2JMYTDxDP40CntjclHUsGpfClFkissbgM_dNUuASzLy0DH8Z1VmaR16mC4---6-IW5VN9z0=&c=tazCzFj3yNFyBCdHBe8ErzloLvCkc8GCRcdxEGxKQc7FgTjmLc_n2w==&ch=vL8aBBoPtZ0hX4uygJp16tDzpZuxbqboKqYbIG45H1dzynfuNVpq5g==).

clean_body: Pelosi and the Democrats have spent the last two years and $11 million attacking us. They're willing to spend millions more if it means defeating us. . == We need you to understand this, Friend: The Democrats spent $11,000,000.00 attacking us, running ads that distorted the truth and intentionally misled voters. They outspent us 3:1 -- spending more dark money against us than any other race in the nation! And we won by only a couple thousand votes in one of the closest, toughest races in the nation. Now, our opponent is gearing up for a rematch and this seat remains a top-target. We can't let Nancy Pelosi buy this seat out from under us. We can't give her even an inch. Not when the House Majority hinges on this seat. Not when the future of our nation is on the line. H ELP TAKE BACK THE HOUSE FOR REPUBLICANS | | == ** | | == | == | | == | == | | == With only a very few seats standing between us and a Republican House Majority, 2022 is our best chance to restore a conservative agenda and return quick, common-sense leadership to Washington. But we can't do that without your help -- not with Nancy Pelosi laser-focused on top-targeted seats like ours. Pelosi and the Democrats have spent the last two years and $11 million attacking us. name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Georgia: Tomorrow is the first day of Early Voting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/7021562/77506120/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - It's almost here! **Early in-person voting for the January 5 runoff elections starts tomorrow, December 14** , and goes through December 31 in most counties. Find out hours and locations for early voting sites in your county by visiting [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/7021563/77506120/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or by calling the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. When you head to the polls, don't forget to bring [an acceptable form of identification](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/7021560/77506120/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2"). **Prefer to vote by mail?** Join 1.2 million Georgians by requesting your mail ballot at [ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/7021561/77506120/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov/"). There's still time, but don't wait-- request your ballot today! **Already requested a mail ballot?** Great! First, confirm your ballot was mailed out to you and sign up to receive updates at [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/702156e/77506120/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/"). Next, follow the instructions and fill it out-- make sure you sign the oath on the outside of the envelope. Return your ballot immediately by drop box, to your county elections office, or by mail! Go to [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/702156f/77506120/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate") if you need help finding where you can return your ballot. After you've returned your mail ballot, check [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/702156e/77506120/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to make sure it is received. **Requested a mail ballot but want to vote in person instead?** No problem! As long as your ballot has not been returned to your county elections office or to a drop box, you can still vote in person. Go to [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/7021563/77506120/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") for hours and locations of early voting sites in your county. If you have your mail ballot, bring it with you and let the elections worker know you would like to cancel it. Don't have your ballot? No worries. Tell the elections worker you requested a mail ballot but decided to vote in person instead. In this case, you will be asked to sign an affidavit to cancel your mail ballot, enabling you to vote early in person. If you have any questions or need help please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 or check out [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/702156c/77506120/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/") for more information. \- Team Fair Fight |
---|---|---

|

[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/702156d/77506120/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/702156a/77506120/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa328/34a064cc/1ae7c2a2/702156b/77506120/VEsHBw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")
